name: Wooting 60HE+
description: The board thock's Hall-effect coverage keeps citing as the analog-input reference point: hotswappable Lekker Hall-effect switches, true analog input, and per-key adjustable rapid trigger in a tray-mount ABS case. Wired USB-C only, no wireless option. Entered mass production in April 2022 and remains the fixed point reviewers measure newer HE and TMR boards against for rapid-trigger tuning depth and configurator maturity.
